title: The Best Way to Walk
overview: In 1960, Marc and Philippe are counselors at a summer camp in the French countryside. One night, Marc finds Philippe dressed and made up as a woman, and from now on, he will keep on humiliating Philippe.

trailers.title: La meilleure façon de marcher (1976) Bande Annonce VF [HD]
